name: maya-ai-root
description: Root package for Maya AI to run frontend and backend concurrently

scripts.install:all: npm install && cd frontend && npm install && cd ../backend && .\.venv\Scripts\activate.bat && pip install -r requirements.txt
scripts.start: concurrently -c "cyan,magenta" -n "backend,frontend" "backend\.venv\Scripts\python.exe -m uvicorn backend.api.main:app --host 127.0.0.1 --port 8000" "cd frontend && npm run dev"
